## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Compatibility

- [ ] No user-visible compatibility impact
- [ ] DSL or schema impact is documented with a migration path
- [ ] Platform-specific behavior is guarded and tested

## Verification

List the commands and scenarios used to verify the change.

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features --locked -- -D warnings`
- [ ] Relevant Rust tests pass
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated when needed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or identifying capture data are included
